urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Watch: Flooded towns and evacuations as Chile hit by heavy rain
latest.summary: Officials in Chile have declared a state of catastrophe in the Coquimbo region and the province of Huasco due to heavy rains. At least five fatalities have been reported as a result of the extreme weather.
latest.details: Officials in Chile have declared a state of catastrophe in the Coquimbo region and the province of Huasco due to heavy rains. At least five fatalities have been reported as a result of the extreme weather. More than 99,000 people are isolated, and several individuals are missing across the country. Areas in Coquimbo have experienced historic rainfall, with over 200mm recorded at Cerro Tololo.
latest.full_brief: Officials in Chile have declared a state of catastrophe in the Coquimbo region and the province of Huasco due to heavy rains. At least five fatalities have been reported as a result of the extreme weather. More than 99,000 people are isolated, and several individuals are missing across the country. Areas in Coquimbo have experienced historic rainfall, with over 200mm recorded at Cerro Tololo.

latest.title: Canada ready to ‘intensify’ trade talks as Trump orders new tariffs – US politics live
latest.summary: President Donald Trump is preparing to impose new tariffs on numerous countries, with a temporary 10% global tariff set to expire soon. The Lebanese president, Joseph Aoun, is scheduled to meet Trump in Washington amid military developments in southern Lebanon.
latest.details: President Donald Trump is preparing to impose new tariffs on numerous countries, with a temporary 10% global tariff set to expire soon. The Lebanese president, Joseph Aoun, is scheduled to meet Trump in Washington amid military developments in southern Lebanon. The Lebanese military is under pressure to disarm Hezbollah, a condition set by Israel for ending its occupation. The Pentagon has identified two soldiers killed in recent Iranian strikes, with a third service member also reported dead.

The Lebanese military is under pressure to disarm Hezbollah, a condition set by Israel for ending its occupation. The Pentagon has identified two soldiers killed in recent Iranian strikes, with a third service member also reported dead.

latest.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
latest.summary: The strikes on Iran mark the 10th consecutive night of attacks following US President Donald Trump's vow to retaliate for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran has responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region.
latest.details: The strikes on Iran mark the 10th consecutive night of attacks following US President Donald Trump's vow to retaliate for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran has responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region. US Central Command reported that the latest strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites. The situation escalated with reports of explosions in various locations, including the Gulf ports and near the city of Tabriz.
latest.full_brief: The strikes on Iran mark the 10th consecutive night of attacks following US President Donald Trump's vow to retaliate for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran has responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region. US Central Command reported that the latest strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites. The situation escalated with reports of explosions in various locations, including the Gulf ports and near the city of Tabriz.

latest.title: Tropical Storm Bertha threatens US Gulf coast
latest.summary: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days.
latest.details: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days. Forecasters predict that some areas could receive up to 8 inches of rain by Friday, with isolated tornados possible in Florida. A tropical storm watch is currently in effect for specific regions in Florida and Louisiana.
latest.full_brief: Tropical Storm Bertha was located about 105 miles south of Panama City, Florida, carrying windspeeds of 40mph. The storm is expected to move near or along the northern Gulf coast over the next several days. Forecasters predict that some areas could receive up to 8 inches of rain by Friday, with isolated tornados possible in Florida. A tropical storm watch is currently in effect for specific regions in Florida and Louisiana.

latest.title: Bumblebees are struggling in UK heatwaves - but you can help them
latest.summary: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C.
latest.details: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C. The data shows that in 2022, common bumblebee species experienced significant population drops, with red-tailed bumblebees down by 20%. Additionally, the effects of the heatwaves extended into 2023, with queen numbers below average in early spring.
latest.full_brief: The Bumblebee Conservation Trust's monitoring scheme indicates a decline in bumblebee populations following the heat of 2022. UK bumblebees struggle to fly when temperatures reach between 28C and 32C. The data shows that in 2022, common bumblebee species experienced significant population drops, with red-tailed bumblebees down by 20%. Additionally, the effects of the heatwaves extended into 2023, with queen numbers below average in early spring.

latest.title: Healthy diet too expensive for one in three people globally, UN report finds
latest.summary: A UN report has revealed that one in three people globally cannot afford a healthy diet, highlighting a significant issue of food affordability. In Africa, 66.6% of the population is unable to afford a healthy diet, which is more than double the levels in Asia or Latin America.
latest.details: A UN report has revealed that one in three people globally cannot afford a healthy diet, highlighting a significant issue of food affordability. In Africa, 66.6% of the population is unable to afford a healthy diet, which is more than double the levels in Asia or Latin America. The report indicates that global hunger has declined for the third consecutive year, but the proportion of people unable to eat well remains alarmingly high. Experts are calling for urgent action to address the costs of nutritious food and improve dietary diversity.
latest.full_brief: A UN report has revealed that one in three people globally cannot afford a healthy diet, highlighting a significant issue of food affordability. In Africa, 66.6% of the population is unable to afford a healthy diet, which is more than double the levels in Asia or Latin America. The report indicates that global hunger has declined for the third consecutive year, but the proportion of people unable to eat well remains alarmingly high. Experts are calling for urgent action to address the costs of nutritious food and improve dietary diversity.

latest.title: ‘A big job ahead of him’: world leaders congratulate Andy Burnham as he becomes Britain’s PM
latest.summary: Andy Burnham made his first speech as British prime minister in Downing Street on Monday. He is the seventh prime minister of the UK in a decade.
latest.details: Andy Burnham made his first speech as British prime minister in Downing Street on Monday. He is the seventh prime minister of the UK in a decade. World leaders, including Emmanuel Macron and Ursula von der Leyen, congratulated him and expressed hopes for stronger international partnerships. However, media coverage highlighted the immense challenges he faces, particularly regarding the UK's social and economic issues.
latest.full_brief: Andy Burnham made his first speech as British prime minister in Downing Street on Monday. He is the seventh prime minister of the UK in a decade. World leaders, including Emmanuel Macron and Ursula von der Leyen, congratulated him and expressed hopes for stronger international partnerships. However, media coverage highlighted the immense challenges he faces, particularly regarding the UK's social and economic issues.

latest.title: What does an Andy Burnham-led government mean for your money?
latest.summary: In his first speech as prime minister, Andy Burnham promised to provide people with more 'breathing space' regarding their finances. He is considering changes to the tax-free personal allowance ahead of his first Budget in the autumn.
latest.details: In his first speech as prime minister, Andy Burnham promised to provide people with more 'breathing space' regarding their finances. He is considering changes to the tax-free personal allowance ahead of his first Budget in the autumn. The cost of living is a significant concern for many, affecting their ability to afford basic activities. Burnham's plans may involve tough funding choices to support transport costs and affordable housing.
latest.full_brief: In his first speech as prime minister, Andy Burnham promised to provide people with more 'breathing space' regarding their finances. He is considering changes to the tax-free personal allowance ahead of his first Budget in the autumn. The cost of living is a significant concern for many, affecting their ability to afford basic activities. Burnham's plans may involve tough funding choices to support transport costs and affordable housing.

latest.title: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
latest.summary: The AI Minister, Kanishka Narayan, has been invited to attend cabinet meetings under Prime Minister Andy Burnham. The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology has been abolished, with its responsibilities redistributed among other departments.
latest.details: The AI Minister, Kanishka Narayan, has been invited to attend cabinet meetings under Prime Minister Andy Burnham. The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology has been abolished, with its responsibilities redistributed among other departments. Narayan, who was previously appointed by Sir Keir Starmer, emphasized the importance of AI for the future of Britain. Experts have expressed concerns about the implications of AI on jobs and the need for continued government support in technology.
latest.full_brief: The AI Minister, Kanishka Narayan, has been invited to attend cabinet meetings under Prime Minister Andy Burnham. The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology has been abolished, with its responsibilities redistributed among other departments. Narayan, who was previously appointed by Sir Keir Starmer, emphasized the importance of AI for the future of Britain. Experts have expressed concerns about the implications of AI on jobs and the need for continued government support in technology.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.
